hero.title: Proyecto educativo
hero.subtitle: Apoyamos a niños, familias, educadores y comunidades a través de un enfoque integrado que une pedagogía Montessori, arte, naturaleza y desarrollo humano.

about.title: Educación consciente e integrada
about.description: Montessori All Around es un proyecto educativo que une pedagogía Montessori, arte, naturaleza y desarrollo humano para apoyar a niños, familias, educadores y comunidades.

vision.title: Visión
vision.description: Contribuir a una cultura educativa más consciente, donde niños y adultos crecen en ambientes respetuosos e inspiradores.

mission.title: Misión
mission.description: Apoyar el desarrollo integral del niño y guiar a los adultos en su papel como guías de la infancia.

nature.title: Naturaleza
nature.description: Programas que conectan a niños y familias con el mundo natural, promoviendo experiencias al aire libre.

art.title: Arte
art.description: Fotografía, pintura y escultura como parte esencial del desarrollo humano y educativo.

about.quote: La educación es un proceso natural que se desarrolla espontáneamente en el ser humano.

educator.name: Roberta Carreira
educator.title: Educadora Montessori Internacional y Líder Pedagógica

profile.title: Perfil Profesional
profile.bio1: Soy una educadora Montessori internacional con más de 20 años de experiencia en educación infantil, habiendo trabajado en Portugal, China, Italia y Estados Unidos.
profile.bio2: Mi trayectoria incluye el liderazgo y desarrollo de ambientes Montessori de alta calidad para niños de 6 meses a 7 años, siempre con un fuerte enfoque en la autonomía, desarrollo emocional, creatividad y excelencia educativa.
profile.bio3: Combino la pedagogía Montessori con mi formación en Bellas Artes, Yoga para niños y una profunda conexión con la naturaleza, creando experiencias educativas verdaderamente holísticas.

certifications.title: Formación y Certificaciones
items: Certificación American Montessori Society (AMS/MACTE) - Seton Montessori Institute, Chicago
Profesora de Yoga y Mindfulness para Niños - Yoga Maya Kids International
Licenciatura en Bellas Artes - Pintura, cum laude - Perugia, Italia

expertise.title: Competencias
items: Educación Montessori (Bebés, Toddlers y Primera Infancia)
Gestión de Aula y de Equipo
Integración de Arte, Yoga y Movimiento
Aprendizaje en la Naturaleza y Planificación Curricular

international.title: Experiencia Internacional
international.description: Incluyendo escuelas de referencia como Montessori School of Shanghai, The Little Oaks Montessori, Boundless Life y Nido Montessori Lisboa.

methodology.title: Los Cuatro Pilares
methodology.description: Nuestro enfoque integrado une cuatro elementos fundamentales para crear experiencias educativas transformadoras que respetan al ser humano en desarrollo.

montessori.title: Pedagogía Montessori
montessori.description: Enfoque educativo centrado en el niño, respetando su ritmo natural de desarrollo y autonomía.

art.title: Arte y Cultura
art.description: Fotografía, pintura y escultura integradas en el proceso educativo como expresión del desarrollo humano.

nature.title: Naturaleza
nature.description: Experiencias al aire libre que conectan a niños y familias con el mundo natural en Lisboa y Sintra.

community.title: Comunidad
community.description: Construcción de una red educativa que une familias, educadores y escuelas en torno a valores comunes.

methodology.quote: El niño no es un vaso a ser llenado, sino una fuente a ser liberada.

services.title: Cómo Podemos Ayudar
services.description: Ofrecemos una variedad de servicios para apoyar a niños, familias, educadores y comunidades en el camino Montessori.

familyConsulting.title: Consultoría para Familias
familyConsulting.description: Orientación personalizada para padres y cuidadores que desean implementar el enfoque Montessori en casa.

babysitting.title: Cuidado Infantil Educativo
babysitting.description: Cuidado infantil basado en los principios Montessori, respetando el ritmo y las necesidades de cada niño.

yoga.title: Yoga para Niños
yoga.description: Sesiones de yoga adaptadas para niños, promoviendo bienestar físico, emocional y concentración.

nature.title: Programas en la Naturaleza
nature.description: Experiencias educativas al aire libre que conectan a niños y familias con el mundo natural.

cultural.title: Experiencias Culturales
cultural.description: Programas que integran arte, música y cultura en el desarrollo educativo de los niños.

schoolConsulting.title: Consultoría para Escuelas
schoolConsulting.description: Apoyo en la creación y desarrollo de escuelas Montessori, desde la concepción hasta la implementación.

testimonials.title: Lo Que Dicen las Familias
testimonials.description: Historias reales de familias que confían en Roberta para cuidar de sus hijos.

items.name: Laura Primerano
items.quote: Diana adora absolutamente a Robi. Siempre está feliz de estar con ella y muchas veces pregunta por ella al día siguiente. Para mí, eso dice más que cualquier otra cosa, especialmente cuando vives en el extranjero y lejos de tu propia familia.
items.fullContent:
I am very happy to recommend Roberta ("Robi") as a babysitter and caregiver.

Robi has been caring for my daughter, Diana, since 2023, when Diana was almost three years old. I first met her through a childcare agency, and from the very beginning we were extremely happy with her care and support, we immediately noticed how special she was.

Robi is warm, responsible, joyful, and incredibly attentive. She brings such a lovely energy into our home and has built a beautiful relationship with Diana, she is a family friend now!

Roberta always brings activities, arts and crafts, books, and always finds thoughtful ways to keep her engaged, happy, and interested, Diana learnt a lot from Roberta.

What stands out most to me is how well Robi truly understands Diana's personality and needs. She has always shown a very natural sensitivity in the way she relates to her, and she knows how to meet her with patience, care, and genuine attention. Robi adapts beautifully to Diana's age, stage of development, and emotional needs, and she has also always been very respectful of our family's routines, values, and culture.

She is also highly reliable in all the practical aspects of childcare. Robi can prepare meals, follow routines carefully, and support Diana in a calm and consistent way. On a few occasions when Diana was unwell, Robi also administered medicine responsibly and with great care, which gave us a great deal of peace of mind.

Another lovely part of Diana's time with Robi is that, on a few occasions, she also had the opportunity to spend time with Robi's children, Pedro and Lucy. Diana always had a wonderful time with them, whether going to the park together or playing at home, and those moments were always very positive and enjoyable for her.

Robi speaks English, Italian, and Portuguese, and she adapted very easily when we asked her to speak more Portuguese with Diana.

Most importantly, Diana absolutely adores Robi. She is always happy to be with her and often asks about her again the next day. For me, that says more than anything else, especially when you live abroad and far from your own family, we are really lucky we have found her.

We feel very privileged to have had Robi caring for Diana, and I recommend her with complete confidence to any family looking for someone kind, trustworthy, capable, and genuinely wonderful with children.

I guarantee any family would be very fortunate to have her.

items.name: Bazar Alina
items.quote: Hemos notado un aumento muy visible en la independencia de Iva desde que trabaja con Robi en el entorno Montessori. Iva va al colegio feliz, vuelve a casa feliz, y habla frecuentemente de cuánto disfruta su tiempo con Robi.
items.fullContent:
It is a pleasure to recommend Roberta ("Robi") as both a caregiver and educator.

Robi has been a wonderful support to our family over the past months, both at home and in the classroom. She has cared for our children, Iva and Daniil, and has become a truly valuable part of their daily lives.

Robi has a naturally warm, calm, and engaging way with children. She brings books, creative activities, and games, encouraging meaningful play, interaction, and learning, while thoughtfully reducing screen time. Our children genuinely enjoy being with her and always feel comfortable, happy, and well cared for in her presence.

She is equally reliable in the practical aspects of childcare, including preparing meals, carefully following routines, helping with school pick-ups and drop-offs, and, on several occasions, staying overnight in our home. We have always felt completely at ease trusting her with our children.

What stands out especially is the connection she has built with Iva. Since September 2025, Robi has also been teaching and guiding her in a Montessori classroom setting, which has given her a deep understanding of Iva's personality, needs, and development. We have seen how naturally and beautifully she supports her both at school and at home, always with genuine care, patience, and attention. Iva goes to school happy, comes home happy, and often talks about how much she enjoys her time with Robi.

We have also seen a very noticeable increase in Iva's independence since working with Robi in the Montessori environment. She has naturally developed essential everyday skills — tidying up after herself, putting on her shoes, washing her hands, maintaining personal hygiene, and even helping around the house. These habits appeared organically through Robi's approach and the environment she creates, as at home we had not been specifically focusing on this before. For us, this has been a very meaningful and valuable change.

We have also seen a very positive impact on Iva's learning and language development. She has been speaking more Portuguese, while also continuing to develop her English naturally and confidently. Robi has adapted beautifully to our wishes and supports Iva's growth with intelligence, sensitivity, and care, both in the classroom and at home.

Beyond all of this, we have truly grown very attached to Robi. She has become much more than a caregiver or teacher for our family. She brings a special warmth, energy, and sincerity into every interaction. Robi often sings with the children, and our daughter now knows many of these songs by heart — it creates a joyful, lively atmosphere around her. Learning with Robi always happens through play — naturally, lightly, and without pressure, yet with very real results.

On a few occasions, Robi also brought her own children, Pedro and Lucy, to spend time with ours, and the children always had a wonderful time together, whether at home or outdoors.

Robi brings a rare combination of warmth, trustworthiness, attentiveness, and professionalism, and we recommend her wholeheartedly to any family. She has been a true support to ours, and any family would be very lucky to have her.
